reasoning: Propineb is a polymeric zinc ethylene bisdithiocarbamate fungicide, where the dithiocarbamate groups are linked via propylene (1,2-propylenediamine) units coordinated with zinc, belonging to the EBDC (ethylene bisdithiocarbamate) class. It contains the characteristic -NH-CS-S- dithiocarbamate moieties bridged by an alkylene chain.
